testcase.name: test_list_products_returns_seeded

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 9 seeded products, got 14 assert 14 == 9 + where 14 = len([{'category': 'Ethnic Wear', 'description': 'Authentic Banarasi silk saree handwoven by artisans in Varanasi. Comes with matching blouse piece. Perfect for weddings and festive occasions.', 'id': '60a955c2-e9db-4a8c-82dc-a9febf889211', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1717585679395-bbe39b5fb6bc?crop=entropy&cs=srgb&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w3NDQ2NDF8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHwzfHxpbmRpYW4lMjBldGhuaWMlMjB3ZWFyJTIwZmFzaGlvbnxlbnwwfHx8fDE3ODExMzIyNjl8MA&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=85', ...}, {'category': 'Ethnic Wear', 'description': 'Three-piece Anarkali suit with intricate zari embroidery. Includes dupatta and bottoms. Imported directly from Jaipur.', 'id': 'fa7ec4ea-4307-43b6-a47b-f3c9ab56bee9', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1503160865267-af4660ce7bf2?crop=entropy&cs=srgb&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w3NDQ2NDF8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHwxfHxpbmRpYW4lMjBldGhuaWMlMjB3ZWFyJTIwZmFzaGlvbnxlbnwwfHx8fDE3ODExMzIyNjl8MA&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=85', ...}, {'category': 'Ethnic Wear', 'description': 'Bridal-grade lehenga with mirror work and sequins. Three-piece set. Custom alterations available on request.', 'id': '67a53141-4349-4332-a506-40715bbd5cce', 'image': 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/14928074/pexels-photo-14928074.jpeg?a...ess&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=650&w=940', ...}, {'category': 'Home & Decor', 'description': 'Hand-cast brass Ganesha idol from Moradabad. Polished finish, weighs 850g. Perfect for home temple or as a gift.', 'id': 'dbb6b65e-0c74-4e49-aedc-bdc7330f896c', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1650383044645-5d32141ad1a3?crop=entropy&cs=srgb&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w3NTY2ODh8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHwzfHxpbmRpYW4lMjBoYW5kaWNyYWZ0cyUyMGJyYXNzfGVufDB8fHx8MTc4MTEzMjI2OXww&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=85', ...}, {'category': 'Home & Decor', 'description': 'Traditional oil lamps for Diwali and daily worship. Hand-engraved with floral motifs.', 'id': 'b5691a80-4b69-4fc4-b600-bd9865030777', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1652960018678-1f19799996c5?crop=entropy&cs=srgb&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w3NTY2ODh8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHwxfHxpbmRpYW4lMjBoYW5kaWNyYWZ0cyUyMGJyYXNzfGVufDB8fHx8MTc4MTEzMjI2OXww&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=85', ...}, {'category': 'Home & Decor', 'description': 'Full pooja kit: thali, bell, incense holder, kalash and diya. Wedding gift favourite.', 'id': '2f60d661-53a3-4357-a45e-b91c6d753441', 'image': 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/15755947/pexels-photo-15755947.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=650&w=940', ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: tests/test_products.py:9: in test_list_products_returns_seeded assert len(items) == 9, f"expected 9 seeded products, got {len(items)}" E AssertionError: expected 9 seeded products, got 14 E assert 14 == 9 E + where 14 = len([{'category': 'Ethnic Wear', 'description': 'Authentic Banarasi silk saree handwoven by artisans in Varanasi. Comes with matching blouse piece. Perfect for weddings and festive occasions.', 'id': '60a955c2-e9db-4a8c-82dc-a9febf889211', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1717585679395-bbe39b5fb6bc?crop=entropy&cs=srgb&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w3NDQ2NDF8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHwzfHxpbmRpYW4lMjBldGhuaWMlMjB3ZWFyJTIwZmFzaGlvbnxlbnwwfHx8fDE3ODExMzIyNjl8MA&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=85', ...}, {'category': 'Ethnic Wear', 'description': 'Three-piece Anarkali suit with intricate zari embroidery. Includes dupatta and bottoms. Imported directly from Jaipur.', 'id': 'fa7ec4ea-4307-43b6-a47b-f3c9ab56bee9', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1503160865267-af4660ce7bf2?crop=entropy&cs=srgb&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w3NDQ2NDF8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHwxfHxpbmRpYW4lMjBldGhuaWMlMjB3ZWFyJTIwZmFzaGlvbnxlbnwwfHx8fDE3ODExMzIyNjl8MA&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=85', ...}, {'category': 'Ethnic Wear', 'description': 'Bridal-grade lehenga with mirror work and sequins. Three-piece set. Custom alterations available on request.', 'id': '67a53141-4349-4332-a506-40715bbd5cce', 'image': 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/14928074/pexels-photo-14928074.jpeg?a...ess&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=650&w=940', ...}, {'category': 'Home & Decor', 'description': 'Hand-cast brass Ganesha idol from Moradabad. Polished finish, weighs 850g. Perfect for home temple or as a gift.', 'id': 'dbb6b65e-0c74-4e49-aedc-bdc7330f896c', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1650383044645-5d32141ad1a3?crop=entropy&cs=srgb&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w3NTY2ODh8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHwzfHxpbmRpYW4lMjBoYW5kaWNyYWZ0cyUyMGJyYXNzfGVufDB8fHx8MTc4MTEzMjI2OXww&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=85', ...}, {'category': 'Home & Decor', 'description': 'Traditional oil lamps for Diwali and daily worship. Hand-engraved with floral motifs.', 'id': 'b5691a80-4b69-4fc4-b600-bd9865030777', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1652960018678-1f19799996c5?crop=entropy&cs=srgb&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w3NTY2ODh8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHwxfHxpbmRpYW4lMjBoYW5kaWNyYWZ0cyUyMGJyYXNzfGVufDB8fHx8MTc4MTEzMjI2OXww&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=85', ...}, {'category': 'Home & Decor', 'description': 'Full pooja kit: thali, bell, incense holder, kalash and diya. Wedding gift favourite.', 'id': '2f60d661-53a3-4357-a45e-b91c6d753441', 'image': 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/15755947/pexels-photo-15755947.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=650&w=940', ...}, ...])

testcase.name: test_duplicate_gstin_returns_409
testcase.failure: tests/test_seller.py:122: in test_duplicate_gstin_returns_409 assert r1.status_code == 200, r1.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"This GSTIN is already registered with another seller"} E assert 409 == 200 E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code
